query: I have an inventory snapshot fact table with QtyOnHand per warehouse per day. What Power BI visual should I use to show current stock levels by product and warehouse?
why: Core use case: periodic snapshot on-hand levels mapped to a Power BI visual (matrix).

query: building a procurement dashboard for our vendors - need to show on-time delivery rate and lead time by supplier. which charts work best?
why: Procurement/vendor performance + OTD + lead time visual recommendation is squarely in scope.

query: how do I chart inventory turnover and days of supply for each SKU in power bi?
why: Inventory turnover and days of supply ranking is a named in-scope question.

query: I want a funnel that shows our order fulfillment pipeline from order placed to picked to shipped to delivered
why: Accumulating-snapshot order pipeline -> funnel is explicitly the skill's pipeline pattern.

query: my on-hand qty line chart over the year looks way too high, the numbers are adding up across days and that's wrong
why: Semi-additive inventory balance problem (do not SUM on-hand across dates) is the skill's critical rule.

query: need a viz for fill rate and backlog for our distribution center ops report
why: Fill rate and backlog (order management/logistics) are named in-scope supply chain questions.

query: what's the best way to show shipment volume trends and stockout counts month over month for the logistics team
why: Transaction-fact additive flow (shipments, stockout counts) trend visuals are in scope.

query: we run three plants and i need to compare manufacturing throughput per line, plus show WIP that's sitting at each stage
why: Plant/manufacturing throughput visualization is explicitly listed in scope.

query: warehouse mgr wants a gauge showing on-hand vs the min/max reorder thresholds per item, can power bi do that
why: Gauge of on-hand vs reorder min/max is an exact fact-type->visual affinity entry.

query: I have receipts, picks, ships and adjustments transactions - want a waterfall going beginning balance -> receipts -> sales -> adjustments -> ending balance
why: Inventory transaction waterfall (beg->receipts->sales->adj->end) is a listed pattern, uncommon but valid.

query: my inventory model has on-hand snapshots and I'm not sure whether that fact is additive or semi-additive before I aggregate it anywhere
why: Pure additivity classification question -> understanding-fact-additivity, not the supply-chain visual mapping.

query: write a DAX measure to get the last non-empty on-hand balance at period end using CLOSINGBALANCEMONTH
why: Authoring the semi-additive period-end DAX itself -> applying-time-intelligence / authoring-dax-measures.

query: I need a star schema in Power Query - shaping our ERP purchase order extract into a fact and conformed vendor/date dimensions
why: Data shaping into star schema in Power Query -> transforming-data-power-query, not visualization.

query: set up RLS so each regional warehouse manager only sees their own site's inventory rows
why: Row-level security by warehouse -> securing-row-level-access, despite inventory context.

query: our retail merchandising team needs visuals for POS sales, promo lift and ecommerce conversion by product category
why: Retail POS/promo/ecommerce visuals -> retail-analytics-visualization, sibling industry skill.

query: connect Power BI to our SAP S/4HANA inventory tables - import vs directquery for a 200M row movements table?
why: Connector and storage-mode decision -> connecting-data-sources, not visual selection.

query: how do I add drillthrough from the supplier scorecard page to a detail page filtered to that one vendor's POs?
why: Drillthrough navigation pattern -> drill-pattern-design / building-interactive-reports.

query: i want a key influencers visual to find what drives our late shipments - carrier, lane, weight?
why: Key Influencers AI visual root-cause -> ai-powered-analysis-selection, despite logistics topic.

query: lay out an executive supply chain dashboard - what goes top-left, how many visuals per page for a C-suite audience
why: Multi-visual layout for an audience -> dashboard-composition, not per-question visual mapping.

query: my inventory report with 80M snapshot rows is super slow, performance analyzer shows a measure taking 9 seconds
why: Slow report/large model tuning -> optimizing-model-performance, despite inventory data.
